'''Opirus Personal Lasers''' was a manufacturing company that specialized in creating [[Laser/Legends|laser]]-engraving mechanisms such as [[tri-laser engraver]]s,<ref name="GG11" /> and manufacturing security systems such as the [[Model FD 62 security descrambler]].<ref name="ST" />

{{Company-stub}}
